title: phedimus litoralis
intro: Phedimus litoralis, also known as Rock Sea Campion, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant in the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rock Sea Campion has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Phedimus litoralis have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Rock Sea Campion is often used to create infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
